title: Screen candidates directly from your Applicant Tracking System
text:
# Screen candidates directly from your Applicant Tracking System

Start 14-day free trial

Explore integrations

rank-shortlist-aptitude

## Adaface integrations directory

 

### Slack

With the Slack integration you can now get alerts for Adaface events right within your communication tool and everyone in your team can monitor and react to the events. Get notified when:

* A candidate is invited to a test
* A candidate completes the test, with their score

 
Read documentation

### Workable

Workable provides the tools you need to manage multiple hiring pipelines, from posting a job to sourcing candidates.

Transparent communication, organized candidate profiles, structured interviews, and a full reporting suite gives hiring teams the information they need to make the right choice.

 
Read documentation

### Greenhouse

Greenhouse is an applicant tracking system and recruiting software designed to help businesses find suitable candidates, conduct focused interviews and optimize their recruiting process. It offers complete visibility of the candidate pipeline and is suitable for growing and midsize companies.

 
Read documentation

### Lever

Lever is a top-rated recruiting software that helps your talent teams scale recruitment efforts and hire people faster. With Lever, you get the power of an ATS+CRM so you can be prepared for any challenge and find quality candidates to help drive your organization’s success.

 
Read documentation

### SmartRecruiters

SmartRecruiters Talent Acquisition Suite is used by high-performance organizations for making the best hires. It has full functionality for recruitment marketing and collaborative hiring built on a modern cloud platform with an open marketplace for 3rd party recruitment services.

 
Read documentation

### SAP SuccessFactors

SAP SuccessFactors facilitates the various aspects of human resource and talent management. The capabilities cover all 4 aspects of human resource management- recruiting, learning & development, performance management and compensation management.

### Ashby

Ashby is the only full-suite recruiting solution that combines your ATS, sourcing, CRM, scheduling, and analytics into a single platform, which means less context switching, faster onboarding, and better UX. With this integration you can now use Adaface from within Ashby.

 
Read documentation

### Hubspot

Hubspot is a customer platform that connects everything scaling companies need to deliver a best-in-class customer experience into one place. With this integration you can now use Adaface from within your Hubspot to send assessment invites to candidates and track candidate scores.

 
Read documentation

### Oorwin

Oorwin is a talent intelligence platform designed to streamline and enhance the recruitment process for businesses. This platform integrates various functionalities such as Applicant Tracking System (ATS), Vendor Management System (VMS), and Customer Relationship Management (CRM) into a single, unified interface.

 
Read documentation

### Adaface API

Using the Adaface API, you can build out custom integrations catered for your teams. You can:

* Fetch list of available tests
* Invite candidates to a test
* Track status
* Fetch results

 
Read documentation
